findings.title: Untested new-file detection cannot work from cached file list
findings.detail: Section 2e says to find 'new .sh or .md files' from git diff --name-only, but --name-only does not indicate whether a path is newly added or merely modified.

findings.title: Spec Coverage skips this spec's acceptance-scenario format
findings.detail: Instructions only extract numbered Given/When/Then lines.

findings.title: Missing ledger data has no degraded header state
findings.detail: Missing-status ledger set LEDGER_AVAILABLE=false in gate but valid JSON re-sets it to true in summary section. Degraded flag not preserved.

findings.title: No validation for counting and degraded-input paths
findings.detail: Non-trivial logic has no tests or scripted verification.

findings.title: Missing or malformed review-ledger.json still hard-stops the approve flow
findings.detail: Quality Gate still STOPs when review-ledger.json is missing or fails JSON parsing.

findings.title: Open high findings are still blocked before approval-summary generation
findings.detail: Quality Gate STOPs when status is has_open_high.

findings.title: CLAUDE.md changed outside planned feature scope
findings.detail: The plan says this feature modifies global/specflow.approve.md only.

findings.title: Unknown ledger status relaxed beyond spec scope
findings.detail: Unknown top-level ledger status now passes as WARNING. The spec only relaxes missing/malformed ledger and has_open_high, not unsupported status values.

findings.title: Untested new files risk skipped when ledger unavailable
findings.detail: Diff-based untested new files heuristic requires LEDGER_AVAILABLE but should still run when diff is available even if ledger is missing.
